title: Update automation image
body:
update based automation image based on [automation-image](https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/434)

comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.

> LGTM
> 
> Just thinking: should this rolling information be placed somewhere where we can easily change it, or perhaps have the updates automated? My first thought was to store it in secrets and automate the updates. I'm not sure if that's feasible, just spitting ideas off the top of my head.

thanks @Honny1 . i have the same thoughts as well. the image trigger from upper stream. and once this kind of pr merged. its upstream (vm change pr from automation_images) should be ready for merging. i will put some thought around it.
It looks like a consistent failure rather than a flake, with three consecutive failures so far. It seems to struggle with empty messages. Any idea what could be causing this? @timcoding1988
This is https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/28014, I need to look at the conmon update status and rebuild the images
